creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Did you build emulator/virtualbox-ose and emulator/virtualbox-ose-kmod self?
/usr/src have exact same version as running kernel+world?

Check:
file work/stage/boot/modules/vboxdrv.ko

VB work for me without errors on 8 hosts with 13.3 amd64.
One of them was migrated to 14.1 yesterday.
